description: Compose windows (label `compose-<draftId>`, Task 14 / spec §5.4). Least-privilege grant: ONLY the event IPC the compose frontend needs. tuxlink-h2y: the window-class `core:window:allow-close` + `allow-destroy` grants were dropped — every close path now routes through the `compose_close_self` app command (a self-only Rust `destroy()`), so a compromised compose window can no longer close/destroy OTHER windows (e.g. main). App commands (e.g. `message_send`, `compose_close_self`) are not ACL-gated in Tauri 2 — they are reachable because this capability gives the compose window an IPC bridge.
